message: It might be incredibly luxurious to have only this few people in such a vast space.
You know, if you just stand there with your mouth open, you look like an idiot.
Don't poke fun at everything.
Because...
As an ex, it's hard for me to see the man I broke up with become pathetic.
So what are you saying, that I've diminished as a man?
Oh, do you have something to reflect on?
Saying that,
she chuckled softly.
I know of a few mansions that are this spacious.
One is my maternal home and the other is
his family home.
It seems like there's some reason for her starting to live alone, but she doesn't say anything about it.
It's pointless to dig deeper, though.
In the past, I wanted a house spacious enough to host parties like this,
but now I've lost interest in that.
The atmosphere has become even more glamorous,
and everything seems to shine brighter.
I can't help the excitement bubbling in my heart. It's been years since I've felt this way.
I just wish I could enjoy it from the bottom of my heart.
As always, I’m wearing a custom-made haute couture dress and my hair is perfectly styled.
Even though she usually dresses in a traditional style, when it comes to a party, she suddenly becomes flashy.
What's that?
She may be a young lady by nature, but being able to wear such a dress without doing any proper work is a privilege.
I might feel envious about that.
However, this bold and confident look is also her charm.
is also part of its charm,
Even after saying she isn't getting along well with Guy,
is beaming with confidence as if nothing happened.
Even if her heart is murky, where does her strength to hide it in such situations come from?
I am,
being shown the strength of such a woman.
Inspired by the appearance of the two actresses, she looks brighter than earlier.
Women are strange; in front of a rival, they transform into even more beautiful versions of themselves.
I just hope this party can lift her spirits, but that's probably asking too much of her.
Anyway, I really admire her courage.
It's really impressive.
Sorry about earlier.
It's fine. I was the one in the wrong. I'm sorry.
No, I truly apologize for ruining the party you were looking forward to.
So I keep saying, it's really okay.
I wasn't even looking forward to the party, so it’s fine.
I'm doing well. No matter what happens, I'm fine.
I'm good. I'll keep polishing myself, like Gai wouldn't want to let go.
Don't worry about it, it’s not a big deal.
Hey, I've become more beautiful, haven’t I?
Yes, yes, a woman in love is beautiful.
How’s that? Doesn't it stir your heart as my ex? Hehe.
You know, I'm taking cooking classes to improve my skills. I'm done being a woman who can't cook.
Wow.
That's amazing. I wish you had been good at cooking when we were dating.
Oh, well, you just weren't the kind to inspire me.
R-really? Was it my fault?
Oh, are you realizing that now?
You're becoming increasingly beautiful, and it’s a bit overwhelming.
Well, you know. With two actresses like that around, I'm only going to feel worse.
That's not true. You can definitely compete.
Who can I compete against?
Meryl and Jennifer.
No way, stop joking with me.
I'm serious.
You seem to have become even more beautiful than before.
What’s up? Did the sight of beautiful actresses short-circuit your brain or something?
Not really, it’s not that.
You see, a woman's beauty grows by the moment. It's surprising you don't know that yet.
When did you get so good with your words?
That's quite the statement.
Well, I never heard any compliments from you back in school.
That's true. I'm still speaking honestly now.
Oh, really?
Does that mean you've gotten older?
Anyway, I don’t need sympathy. It's not all over yet, I'll keep trying.
I’m not giving you sympathy. Just, when it gets too heavy, come and lean on me before it gets tough.
Yeah, I won’t hesitate to lean on you then. Plus,
nothing has ended yet.
It's strange, I feel a bit lighter now.
